# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security

---
# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration for Automated Backups
# Secure configuration with S3 and file share repository support

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  snapshot-policy.json: |
    {
      "schedule": "0 30 1 * * ?",
      "name": "<daily-snap-{now/d}>",
      "repository": "backup-repo",
      "config": {
        "indices": ["*"],
        "ignore_unavailable": true,
        "include_global_state": true,
        "partial": false
      },
      "retention": {
        "expire_after": "30d",
        "min_count": 5,
        "max_count": 50
      }
    }

  repository-s3.json: |
    {
      "type": "s3",
      "settings": {
        "bucket": "${S3_BUCKET_NAME}",
        "region": "${AWS_REGION}",
        "base_path": "elasticsearch-snapshots",
        "compress": true,
        "server_side_encryption": true,
        "storage_class": "standard_ia",
        "max_restore_bytes_per_sec": "100mb",
        "max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec": "100mb",
        "readonly": false,
        "canned_acl": "private"
      }
    }

  repository-fs.json: |
    {
      "type": "fs",
      "settings": {
        "location": "/mnt/elasticsearch-backups",
        "compress": true,
        "chunk_size": "100mb",
        "max_restore_bytes_per_sec": "100mb",
        "max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec": "100mb",
        "readonly": false
      }
    }

  snapshot-script.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    set -euo pipefail
    
    ES_HOST="${ES_HOST:-localhost}"
    ES_PORT="${ES_PORT:-9200}"
    ES_PROTOCOL="${ES_PROTOCOL:-https}"
    ES_USER="${ES_USER}"
    ES_PASSWORD="${ES_PASSWORD}"
    REPOSITORY="${REPOSITORY:-backup-repo}"
    
    ES_URL="${ES_PROTOCOL}://${ES_HOST}:${ES_PORT}"
    
    create_snapshot() {
      local snapshot_name="$1"
      local indices="${2:-*}"
      
      echo "Creating snapshot: ${snapshot_name}"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${snapshot_name}?wait_for_completion=false" \
        -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
        -d "{
          \"indices\": \"${indices}\",
          \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
          \"include_global_state\": true,
          \"partial\": false,
          \"metadata\": {
            \"taken_by\": \"automated-backup\",
            \"taken_because\": \"scheduled backup\"
          }
        }"
    }
    
    restore_snapshot() {
      local snapshot_name="$1"
      local indices="${2:-*}"
      
      echo "Restoring snapshot: ${snapshot_name}"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${snapshot_name}/_restore" \
        -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
        -d "{
          \"indices\": \"${indices}\",
          \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
          \"include_global_state\": false,
          \"rename_pattern\": \"(.+)\",
          \"rename_replacement\": \"restored_\$1\",
          \"include_aliases\": false
        }"
    }
    
    list_snapshots() {
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X GET "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/_all?pretty"
    }
    
    get_snapshot_status() {
      local snapshot_name="$1"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X GET "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${snapshot_name}/_status?pretty"
    }
    
    delete_snapshot() {
      local snapshot_name="$1"
      
      echo "Deleting snapshot: ${snapshot_name}"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X DELETE "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${snapshot_name}"
    }
    
    verify_repository() {
      echo "Verifying repository: ${REPOSITORY}"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/_verify?pretty"
    }
    
    cleanup_old_snapshots() {
      local retention_days="${1:-30}"
      
      echo "Cleaning up snapshots older than ${retention_days} days"
      
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X DELETE "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/*?older_than=${retention_days}d"
    }
    
    case "${1:-}" in
      create)
        create_snapshot "${2:-snapshot-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}" "${3:-*}"
        ;;
      restore)
        restore_snapshot "${2}" "${3:-*}"
        ;;
      list)
        list_snapshots
        ;;
      status)
        get_snapshot_status "${2}"
        ;;
      delete)
        delete_snapshot "${2}"
        ;;
      verify)
        verify_repository
        ;;
      cleanup)
        cleanup_old_snapshots "${2:-30}"
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Usage: $0 {create|restore|list|status|delete|verify|cleanup} [args]"
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
  namespace: elasticsearch
type: Opaque
stringData:
  es-username: "elastic"
  es-password: "CHANGE_ME_STRONG_PASSWORD_HERE"
  aws-access-key-id: "CHANGE_ME_AWS_ACCESS_KEY"
  aws-secret-access-key: "CHANGE_ME_AWS_SECRET_KEY"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-backup-pvc
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteMany
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 500Gi
  storageClassName: nfs-storage

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-backup
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  schedule: "0 2 * * *"
  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      backoffLimit: 3
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: elasticsearch-snapshot
        spec:
          restartPolicy: OnFailure
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            fsGroup: 1000
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          serviceAccountName: elasticsearch-snapshot-sa
          containers:
          - name: snapshot-backup
            image: curlimages/curl:8.5.0
            imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
            securityContext:
              allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
              readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
              runAsNonRoot: true
              runAsUser: 1000
              capabilities:
                drop:
                  - ALL
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              cp /config/snapshot-script.sh /tmp/snapshot-script.sh
              chmod +x /tmp/snapshot-script.sh
              /tmp/snapshot-script.sh create "daily-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" "*"
            env:
            - name: ES_HOST
              value: "elasticsearch-master"
            - name: ES_PORT
              value: "9200"
            - name: ES_PROTOCOL
              value: "https"
            - name: ES_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
                  key: es-username
            - name: ES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
                  key: es-password
            - name: REPOSITORY
              value: "backup-repo"
            volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /config
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            resources:
              requests:
                memory: "128Mi"
                cpu: "100m"
              limits:
                memory: "256Mi"
                cpu: "200m"
          volumes:
          - name: config
            configMap:
              name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
              defaultMode: 0550
          - name: tmp
            emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-sa
  namespace: elasticsearch

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-role
  namespace: elasticsearch
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["configmaps", "secrets"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-rolebinding
  namespace: elasticsearch
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-sa
  namespace: elasticsearch
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-repository-setup
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  backoffLimit: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch-repository-setup
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      serviceAccountName: elasticsearch-snapshot-sa
      containers:
      - name: setup-repository
        image: curlimages/curl:8.5.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
        command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          ES_URL="${ES_PROTOCOL}://${ES_HOST}:${ES_PORT}"
          
          echo "Setting up S3 repository..."
          REPO_CONFIG=$(cat /config/repository-s3.json | \
            sed "s/\${S3_BUCKET_NAME}/${S3_BUCKET_NAME}/g" | \
            sed "s/\${AWS_REGION}/${AWS_REGION}/g")
          
          curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
            -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/s3-backup-repo" \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d "${REPO_CONFIG}"
          
          echo "Setting up filesystem repository..."
          curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
            -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/fs-backup-repo" \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d @/config/repository-fs.json
          
          echo "Verifying repositories..."
          curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
            -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/s3-backup-repo/_verify?pretty"
          
          curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
            -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/fs-backup-repo/_verify?pretty"
          
          echo "Setting up snapshot lifecycle policy..."
          curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
            -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_slm/policy/daily-snapshots" \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d @/config/snapshot-policy.json
          
          echo "Repository setup completed successfully"
        env:
        - name: ES_HOST
          value: "elasticsearch-master"
        - name: ES_PORT
          value: "9200"
        - name: ES_PROTOCOL
          value: "https"
        - name: ES_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
              key: es-username
        - name: ES_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
              key: es-password
        - name: S3_BUCKET_NAME
          value: "elasticsearch-backups-prod"
        - name: AWS_REGION
          value: "us-east-1"
        - name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
              key: aws-access-key-id
        - name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: elasticsearch-snapshot-credentials
              key: aws-secret-access-key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config
          mountPath: /config
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
      volumes:
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
          defaultMode: 0440
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-restore-script
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  restore.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    set -euo pipefail
    
    ES_HOST="${ES_HOST:-localhost}"
    ES_PORT="${ES_PORT:-9200}"
    ES_PROTOCOL="${ES_PROTOCOL:-https}"
    ES_USER="${ES_USER}"
    ES_PASSWORD="${ES_PASSWORD}"
    REPOSITORY="${REPOSITORY:-backup-repo}"
    SNAPSHOT_NAME="${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
    INDICES="${INDICES:-*}"
    RENAME_PATTERN="${RENAME_PATTERN:-(.+)}"
    RENAME_REPLACEMENT="${RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-restored_\$1}"
    
    ES_URL="${ES_PROTOCOL}://${ES_HOST}:${ES_PORT}"
    
    echo "Starting restore process..."
    echo "Repository: ${REPOSITORY}"
    echo "Snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
    echo "Indices: ${INDICES}"
    
    if [ "${CLOSE_INDICES:-false}" = "true" ]; then
      echo "Closing indices before restore..."
      curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        -X POST "${ES_URL}/${INDICES}/_close?ignore_unavailable=true"
    fi
    
    echo "Initiating restore..."
    RESTORE_RESPONSE=$(curl -k -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=false" \
      -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      -d "{
        \"indices\": \"${INDICES}\",
        \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
        \"include_global_state\": false,
        \"rename_pattern\": \"${RENAME_PATTERN}\",
        \"rename_replacement\": \"${RENAME_REPLACEMENT}\",
        \"include_aliases\": false,
        \"index_settings\": {
          \"index.number_of_replicas\": 1
        },
        \"ignore_index_settings\": [
          \"index.refresh_interval\"
        ]
      }")
    
    echo "Restore initiated: ${RESTORE_RESPONSE}"
    
    echo "Monitoring restore progress..."
    while true; do
      STATUS=$(curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
        "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_status" | \
        grep -o '"state":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
      
      if [ "${STATUS}" = "SUCCESS" ]; then
        echo "Restore completed successfully"
        break
      elif [ "${STATUS}" = "FAILED" ]; then
        echo "Restore failed"
        exit 1
      else
        echo "Restore in progress... Status: ${STATUS}"
        sleep 30
      fi
    done
    
    echo "Restore process completed"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-monitoring
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  monitor.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    set -euo pipefail
    
    ES_HOST="${ES_HOST:-localhost}"
    ES_PORT="${ES_PORT:-9200}"
    ES_PROTOCOL="${ES_PROTOCOL:-https}"
    ES_USER="${ES_USER}"
    ES_PASSWORD="${ES_PASSWORD}"
    
    ES_URL="${ES_PROTOCOL}://${ES_HOST}:${ES_PORT}"
    
    echo "=== Snapshot Repository Status ==="
    curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/_all?pretty"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== Current Snapshots ==="
    curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/_all/_all?pretty"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== Snapshot Lifecycle Policies ==="
    curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      "${ES_URL}/_slm/policy?pretty"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== Running Snapshot Operations ==="
    curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/_status?pretty"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== Snapshot Statistics ==="
    curl -k -s -u "${ES_USER}:${ES_PASSWORD}" \
      "${ES_URL}/_slm/stats?pretty"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-yml-config
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    path.repo: ["/mnt/elasticsearch-backups"]
    
    s3.client.default.endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
    s3.client.default.protocol: https
    s3.client.default.read_timeout: 50s
    s3.client.default.max_retries: 3
    s3.client.default.use_throttle_retries: true
    
    repositories.url.allowed_urls: ["https://*"]
